# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL to download the artifact from (S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: '', description: 'SHA256 checksum for artifact validation (optional)'),
        choice(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT', choices: ['staging', 'production'], description: 'Target deployment environment'),
        text(name: 'TARGET_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of target servers (IP or hostname)'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/application', description: 'Deployment path on target servers'),
        string(name: 'APP_USER', defaultValue: 'appuser', description: 'Application user on target servers'),
        booleanParam(name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING', defaultValue: true, description: 'Backup existing deployment before deploying'),
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart application service after deployment'),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'application', description: 'Service name to restart'),
        choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', choices: ['jar', 'war', 'zip', 'tar.gz', 'docker'], description: 'Type of artifact'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Health check URL for validation (optional)'),
        string(name: 'ROLLBACK_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Rollback artifact URL if deployment fails (optional)'),
        credentials(name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS', description: 'Credentials for artifact repository', defaultValue: '', required: false),
        credentials(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS', description: 'SSH credentials for target servers', defaultValue: 'ssh-deploy-key', required: true),
        string(name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run before deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run after deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Deployment timeout in minutes'),
        booleanParam(name: 'PARALLEL_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: false, description: 'Deploy to all servers in parallel'),
        string(name: 'S3_REGION', defaultValue: 'us-east-1', description: 'AWS S3 region (if using S3)'),
        string(name: 'DOCKER_REGISTRY', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker registry URL (if deploying Docker images)'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_CHECKSUM_VALIDATION', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip checksum validation'),
        booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'Perform dry run without actual deployment')
    ])
])

def artifactFile
def serverList = []
def deploymentSuccess = true
def deploymentResults = [:]

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    options {
        timeout(time: params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        BACKUP_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/backups"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: "date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S", returnStdout: true).trim()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Deployment Parameters ==="
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.TARGET_SERVERS) {
                        error("TARGET_SERVERS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    serverList = params.TARGET_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    if (serverList.isEmpty()) {
                        error("No target servers specified")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifact URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "Target Environment: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Target Servers: ${serverList.join(', ')}"
                    echo "Deployment Path: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}"
                    echo "Artifact Type: ${params.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "*** DRY RUN MODE - No actual changes will be made ***"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Approval for Production') {
            when {
                expression { params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input message: "Deploy to PRODUCTION environment?", 
                              ok: "Deploy",
                              submitter: "admin,deploy-team"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Setup Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Setting up Workspace ==="
                    sh """
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${BACKUP_DIR}
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/*
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifact ==="
                    
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def artifactName = url.split('/').last()
                    artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${artifactName}"
                    
                    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                        downloadFromS3(url, artifactFile)
                    } else if (url.contains('artifactory')) {
                        downloadFromArtifactory(url, artifactFile)
                    } else if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) {
                        downloadFromHttp(url, artifactFile)
                    } else {
                        error("Unsupported artifact URL scheme: ${url}")
                    }
                    
                    sh "ls -lh ${artifactFile}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Validate Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Artifact ==="
                    
                    if (!fileExists(artifactFile)) {
                        error("Downloaded artifact not found: ${artifactFile}")
                    }
                    
                    def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s ${artifactFile}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    echo "Artifact size: ${fileSize} bytes"
                    
                    if (fileSize.toInteger() == 0) {
                        error("Downloaded artifact is empty")
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM && !params.SKIP_CHECKSUM_VALIDATION) {
                        echo "Validating checksum..."
                        def actualChecksum = sh(script: "sha256sum ${artifactFile} | awk '{print \$1}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                        echo "Expected checksum: ${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}"
                        echo "Actual checksum:   ${actualChecksum}"
                        
                        if (actualChecksum != params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM) {
                            error("Checksum validation failed!")
                        }
                        echo "Checksum validation passed"
                    }
                    
                    validateArtifactType(artifactFile, params.ARTIFACT_TYPE)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploying to Target Servers ==="
                    
                    if (params.PARALLEL_DEPLOYMENT) {
                        deployParallel(serverList, artifactFile)
                    } else {
                        deploySequential(serverList, artifactFile)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            when {
                expression { params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Running Health Checks ==="
                    
                    def allHealthy = true
                    
                    serverList.each { server ->
                        if (deploymentResults[server] == 'SUCCESS') {
                            def healthUrl = params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL.replace('SERVER', server)
                            echo "Checking health for ${server}: ${healthUrl}"
                            
                            try {
                                sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
                                
                                def response = sh(
                                    script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 30 ${healthUrl}",
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim()
                                
                                echo "Health check response for ${server}: ${response}"
                                
                                if (response == '200' || response == '204') {
                                    echo "✓ ${server} is healthy"
                                } else {
                                    echo "✗ ${server} health check failed with status: ${response}"
                                    allHealthy = false
                                    deploymentResults[server] = 'UNHEALTHY'
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "✗ Health check failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
                                allHealthy = false
                                deploymentResults[server] = 'UNHEALTHY'
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (!allHealthy) {
                        error("Health checks failed for some servers")
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deployment Summary') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deployment Summary ==="
                    echo "Environment: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "Timestamp: ${env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"
                    echo ""
                    echo "Server Deployment Results:"
                    
                    deploymentResults.each { server, status ->
                        def icon = status == 'SUCCESS' ? '✓' : '✗'
                        echo "${icon} ${server}: ${status}"
                    }
                    
                    def failedServers = deploymentResults.findAll { k, v -> v != 'SUCCESS' }
                    
                    if (!failedServers.isEmpty()) {
                        deploymentSuccess = false
                        echo ""
                        echo "WARNING: Deployment failed on ${failedServers.size()} server(s)"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                if (deploymentSuccess) {
                    echo "=== Deployment Successful ==="
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN completed successfully"
                    } else {
                        emailext(
                            subject: "✓ Deployment Successful - ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}",
                            body: """
                                Deployment to ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT} completed successfully.
                                
                                Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                                Servers: ${serverList.join(', ')}
                                Timestamp: ${env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}
                                
                                Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                            """,
                            to: "${env.CHANGE_AUTHOR_EMAIL ?: 'devops@example.com'}"
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Failed ==="
                
                if (!params.DRY_RUN && params.ROLLBACK_URL) {
                    echo "Rollback URL provided: ${params.ROLLBACK_URL}"
                    echo "Consider triggering rollback deployment"
                }
                
                emailext(
                    subject: "✗ Deployment Failed - ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}",
                    body: """
                        Deployment to ${params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT} failed.
                        
                        Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                        Servers: ${serverList.join(', ')}
                        Timestamp: ${env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}
                        
                        Failed Servers: ${deploymentResults.findAll { k, v -> v != 'SUCCESS' }.keySet().join(', ')}
                        
                        Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                        Console: ${env.BUILD_URL}console
                    """,
                    to: "${env.CHANGE_AUTHOR_EMAIL ?: 'devops@example.com'}",
                    attachLog: true
                )
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'artifacts/**/*', allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
                
                sh """
                    echo "Deployment Results:" > deployment-report.txt
                    echo "==================" >> deployment-report.txt
                    echo "" >> deployment-report.txt
                """
                
                deploymentResults.each { server, status ->
                    sh "echo '${server}: ${status}' >> deployment-report.txt"
                }
                
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'deployment-report.txt', fingerprint: true
            }
        }
        cleanup {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String destination) {
    echo "Downloading from S3: ${s3Url}"
    
    def bucket = s3Url.replaceAll('s3://', '').split('/')[0]
    def key = s3Url.replaceAll("s3://${bucket}/", '')
    
    withAWS(region: params.S3_REGION) {
        s3Download(
            file: destination,
            bucket: bucket,
            path: key,
            force: true
        )
    }
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String destination) {
    echo "Downloading from Artifactory: ${url}"
    
    if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(
            credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS,
            usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACT_USER',
            passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACT_PASS'
        )]) {
            sh """
                curl -u \${ARTIFACT_USER}:\${ARTIFACT_PASS} \
                     -L -o ${destination} \
                     --fail \
                     --show-error \
                     --connect-timeout 30 \
                     --max-time 600 \
                     "${url}"
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -L -o ${destination} \
                 --fail \
                 --show-error \
                 --connect-timeout 30 \
                 --max-time 600 \
                 "${url}"
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromHttp(String url, String destination) {
    echo "Downloading from HTTP/HTTPS: ${url}"
    
    if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(
            credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS,
            usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER',
            passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS'
        )]) {
            sh """
                curl -u \${HTTP_USER}:\${HTTP_PASS} \
                     -L -o ${destination} \
                     --fail \
                     --show-error \
                     --connect-timeout 30 \
                     --max-time 600 \
                     "${url}"
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -L -o ${destination} \
                 --fail \
                 --show-error \
                 --connect-timeout 30 \
                 --max-time 600 \
                 "${url}"
        """
    }
}

def validateArtifactType(String file, String expectedType) {
    echo "Validating artifact type: ${expectedType}"
    
    def actualType = sh(script: "file -b ${file}", returnStdout: true).trim()
    echo "File type: ${actualType}"
    
    switch(expectedType.toLowerCase()) {
        case 'jar':
        case 'war':
            if (!actualType.contains('Java archive') && !actualType.contains('Zip archive')) {
                echo "WARNING: File type may not match expected type ${expectedType}"
            }
            break
        case 'zip':
            if (!actualType.contains('Zip archive')) {
                echo "WARNING: File type may not match expected type ${expectedType}"
            }
            break
        case 'tar.gz':
            if (!actualType.contains('gzip compressed')) {
                echo "WARNING: File type may not match expected type ${expectedType}"
            }
            break
        case 'docker':
            echo "Docker image - skipping file type validation"
            break
    }
}

def deploySequential(List servers, String artifact) {
    echo "Deploying sequentially to ${servers.size()} server(s)"
    
    servers.each { server ->
        try {
            deployToServer(server, artifact)
            deploymentResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "Deployment failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
            deploymentResults[server] = 'FAILED'
            
            if (params.DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                error("Deployment to production server ${server} failed. Stopping deployment.")
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployParallel(List servers, String artifact) {
    echo "Deploying in parallel to ${servers.size()} server(s)"
    
    def parallelSteps = [:]
    
    servers.each { server ->
        parallelSteps[server] = {
            try {
                deployToServer(server, artifact)
                deploymentResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
            } catch (Exception e) {
                echo "Deployment failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
                deploymentResults[server] = 'FAILED'
                throw e
            }
        }
    }
    
    parallel parallelSteps
}

def deployToServer(String server, String artifact) {
    echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
    
    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
        echo "[DRY RUN] Would deploy to ${server}"
        sleep(time: 2, unit: 'SECONDS')
        return
    }
    
    sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS]) {
        def remotePath = params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH
        def artifactName = artifact.split('/').last()
        
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            echo "Backing up existing deployment on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                    "if [ -d ${remotePath} ]; then \
                        sudo tar czf /tmp/backup_${env.DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz -C ${remotePath} . 2>/dev/null || true; \
                    fi"
            """
        }
        
        if (params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT) {
            echo "Running pre-deployment script on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                    "${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
            """
        }
        
        echo "Copying artifact to ${server}"
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${artifact} ${params.APP_USER}@${server}:/tmp/${artifactName}
        """
        
        echo "Extracting and deploying artifact on ${server}"
        
        switch(params.ARTIFACT_TYPE.toLowerCase()) {
            case 'jar':
            case 'war':
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                        "sudo mkdir -p ${remotePath} && \
                         sudo cp /tmp/${artifactName} ${remotePath}/ && \
                         sudo chown -R ${params.APP_USER}:${params.APP_USER} ${remotePath}"
                """
                break
            case 'zip':
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                        "sudo mkdir -p ${remotePath} && \
                         sudo unzip -o /tmp/${artifactName} -d ${remotePath} && \
                         sudo chown -R ${params.APP_USER}:${params.APP_USER} ${remotePath}"
                """
                break
            case 'tar.gz':
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                        "sudo mkdir -p ${remotePath} && \
                         sudo tar xzf /tmp/${artifactName} -C ${remotePath} && \
                         sudo chown -R ${params.APP_USER}:${params.APP_USER} ${remotePath}"
                """
                break
        }
        
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                "rm -f /tmp/${artifactName}"
        """
        
        if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT) {
            echo "Running post-deployment script on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                    "${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
            """
        }
        
        if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
            echo "Restarting service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                    "sudo systemctl restart ${params.SERVICE_NAME} || sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} restart"
            """
            
            sleep(time: 5, unit: 'SECONDS')
            
            def serviceStatus = sh(
                script: """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.APP_USER}@${server} \
                        "sudo systemctl is-active ${params.SERVICE_NAME} 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'"
                """,
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()
            
            if (serviceStatus == 'active') {
                echo "Service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} is active on ${server}"
            } else {
                echo "WARNING: Service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} status is ${serviceStatus} on ${server}"
            }
        }
    }
    
    echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"
}
